headline: Cboe Hires Boudewijn Duinstra as Executive Vice President, Chief Risk Officer
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity and index derivatives, today announced the planned hiring of Boudewijn Duinstra as Executive Vice President and Chief Risk Officer. Upon joining at a future date, Mr. Duinstra will lead Cboe's global risk management function and further strengthen the company's enterprise risk framework, operational resilience, and governance.
